MODULE: cosmos.web.cosmosynapse.engine.swarm_plasticity
FILE: cosmos/web/cosmosynapse/engine/swarm_plasticity.py (652 lines)
CATEGORY: web

DESCRIPTION: Swarm Plasticity — Real-Time Hebbian Learning Engine
=====================================================
Intelligence = Rate of Adaptation.

Theory (Zenodo / CST Framework):
    Hebbian Rule:  Δw_ij = η · x_i · y_j / φⁿ  (fire together, wire together)
    Lyapunov Gate: Learning ONLY occurs when P

CLASSES:
- PlasticityEvent: Record of a single learning event for telemetry.
- SwarmPlasticity: The Synaptic Matrix — Hebbian Learning for the Swarm.

Maintains per-model, per-
  Methods: def identify_context(self, user_physics: dict) -> str
  Methods: def update_weights(self, winner: Optional[str], user_physics: dict, stable: bool=True) -> Optional[P
  Methods: def penalize_instability(self, suppressed_model: str, user_physics: dict)
  Methods: def find_winner(self, final_output: str, thoughts: list) -> Optional[str]
  Methods: def get_optimal_mix(self, context: str) -> dict[str, float]
  Methods: def get_optimal_mix_from_physics(self, user_physics: dict) -> dict[str, float]
  Methods: def save_on_shutdown(self)
  Methods: def get_stats(self) -> dict
